prompt_text: A modern outdoor plaza in Dubai featuring a sleek, futuristic white automated barber pod. A young man with an afro, wearing a tan t-shirt and grey backpack, approaches the machine. Tall skyscrapers and palm trees define the background under a bright, clear sky. Traditional Arabic men in thobes walk by, adding local context to the high-tech setting.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A modern outdoor plaza in Dubai featuring a sleek, futuristic white automated barber pod. A young man with an afro, wearing a tan t-shirt and grey backpack, approaches the machine. Tall skyscrapers and palm trees define the background under a bright, clear sky. Traditional Arabic men in thobes walk by, adding local context to the high-tech setting.

cinematography.cameraShot: Medium shot, handheld following the subject, static once the action starts.

actions: The man approaches the white barber pod and inserts his head into the circular opening.
Mechanical buzzing sounds occur as the machine trims his hair.
The man pulls his head out to reveal a fresh skin fade haircut.
He smiles and gestures toward the camera, showing off the results while his friend comments off-camera.
He turns to look at his reflection in the pod's surface.
dialogue: Friend: 'It's actually cutting, bro. Hair is falling, wallah!'
Subject: 'That's it? Yo, no way! It's gone!'
Friend: 'Man, this fade is clean! Amazing, brother. Crazy, Dubai!'
